m=b%(-1668-(-1670))if f~=m then Q=Q+(-758306+758308)^i end y=(y-f)/((-199640+993170)-(188219-(-605309)))b=(b-m)/(-51865+51867)end return Q end for y=887853+-887852,#Q,-593883-(-593884)do local return(function(y,i,f,m,o,L,z,Z,D,r,X,Q,W,F,E,w,t,H,G,j,U,x,l)E,U,w,r,X,Z,H,x,D,W,G,l,j,Q,t,F=function(y)local Q,i=b(909765+(-193827+-672658)),y[b(-453759-(-497039))]while i do z=b(-985830-(-1029113))Q={}T=F()r[T]=Q Q=y[z]k={Q(e)}V=k[b(756940-((1130874-538482)-(-121678)))]Q=b((((751727+-1613825)-(-825213+354666))-((584038+-926898)+-72985))+18832)z=k[b(522553-479273)]s=k[b(-567445-(-609933))]k=z end else
